result:
Done. Two changes:

- **`app/models/database.py`** — added `Tag` model with `id` (PK), `name` (String 50, unique), and `color` (String 7 for hex codes like `#FF5733`).
- **`app/schemas/tags.py`** — new file with Pydantic `TagCreate` (validates `name` length 1-50, `color` must match `^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$`) and `TagResponse` (includes `id`, uses `from_attributes=True` to read from ORM objects).
